name: Gold Godz
description_short: Gold Godz is a neighborhood pawn shop in North Versailles, PA that buys and sells gold, jewelry, electronics, tools, designer items, and gift cards with fair evaluations and extended payment terms.
description_long: Gold Godz operates as a retail pawn shop located at 1105 Lincoln Highway in North Versailles, Pennsylvania. The business positions itself as a trusted community destination for both buying and selling valuable items, serving customers who need quick cash or are looking for discounted merchandise. The shop maintains consistent operating hours (Monday-Friday 11am-7pm, Saturday 11am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm) and is reachable at 412-839-1199. Gold Godz accepts a diverse range of items including precious metals (gold and jewelry), consumer electronics, tools, designer brand merchandise, and gift cards. Their business model centers on collateral-based transactions where customers can either sell items for immediate cash or pawn goods as security for short-term loans. The company emphasizes fair item evaluation and reliable customer service as core differentiators in the pawn industry. Gold Godz maintains an active social media presence across Instagram, Facebook, and Poshmark under the handle GoldGodz412, suggesting they engage with customers online and may resell items through additional channels. Their marketing emphasizes convenience and competitive pricing for both sellers seeking to monetize possessions and buyers searching for deals. The company's strength lies in serving a hyperlocal market in the North Versailles area, with straightforward transaction processes and no apparent lending restrictions on item types. As a neighborhood pawn shop, Gold Godz operates within the traditional collateral loan and second-hand retail model, relying on item sales markup and pawn loan interest for revenue rather than offering alternative financial products or credit-building services.
address: 1105 Lincoln Hwy, North Versailles Township, PA 15137

company_info.headquarters: 1105 Lincoln Hwy, North Versailles Township, PA 15137

pros: Diverse item acceptance including gold, jewelry, electronics, tools, designer brands, and gift cards
Extended operating hours (11am-7pm weekdays) provide accessibility for working customers
Fair evaluation process emphasized as a competitive advantage
Multiple transaction options: sell items outright or pawn for collateral-based loans
Active social media presence suggests responsive customer engagement
Local neighborhood location in North Versailles eliminates travel for regional customers
Offers affordable deals on second-hand merchandise for budget-conscious buyers
cons: No information provided about pawn loan interest rates, terms, or APR
Limited online presence — no e-commerce platform or online valuation tools mentioned
Website contains no details about loan approval criteria, repayment terms, or redemption policies
No transparency on how 'fair evaluations' are determined or what percentage of item value is offered
Lacks customer reviews or third-party ratings on the website
best_for: Local North Versailles residents needing immediate cash for gold, jewelry, or electronics
Budget shoppers seeking discounted designer items, tools, or second-hand merchandise
Individuals looking to liquidate single valuable items without selling online
Customers seeking collateral-based short-term loans as an alternative to payday loans
diagnosis: Gold Godz is best for residents in the North Versailles area who need immediate cash for valuable items or seek discounted second-hand purchases. The main caveat is the complete absence of website transparency regarding pawn loan rates, terms, and conditions — customers must contact the shop directly to understand borrowing costs before pawning items.
